customManagers.description: Tool versions pinned in the common/bin/jarvis-install-* commands and ci.yml (annotated with `# renovate:`)

packageRules.description: After a jarvis/goss version bump, the matching *_SHA256 must be refreshed with `make bump-digests` (Renovate cannot recompute artifact digests).
prBodyNotes: :warning: This bumps a version only. Run `make bump-digests` and commit the refreshed `*_SHA256` (in the matching `common/bin/jarvis-install-*` command) / `GOSS_SHA256_*` (in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`), or CI will fail closed on the checksum mismatch. For gcloud/azure-cli see `common/deps.sh`.
